message:
chore(pages): update contribute page and regenerate sitemap

contribute/page.tsx:
- Enhanced contribution guidelines
- Better formatting and layout
- Improved call-to-action sections

prompts/[id]/not-found.tsx:
- Minor text refinement

sitemap.xml:
- Regenerated with current routes
- Updated lastmod timestamps
- Added new pages (how_it_was_made, bundles, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
